metadata.description: Workflow Kit: an ambient Claude Code + Obsidian second-brain system. Core plus opt-in plugin packs. The user invokes almost nothing; the workflow generates and organizes work artifacts on its own.

plugins.name: wfk-core
plugins.description: The Core engines (Artifact Engine, Project Sense, Learn, Meta-Orchestrator), one living project doc per project, an agent-maintained intent layer, and a derived Meta Plan. The base everyone installs.
